title: Senior Backend Engineer
jd_text: We're hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to build distributed Python services. You should know Python, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kubernetes, and have experience designing high-throughput APIs. Familiarity with LLM tool use is a plus.

title: Staff Software Engineer, Platform
jd_text: Northwind is looking for a Staff Engineer to lead our platform team. Python, distributed systems, observability (OpenTelemetry), Kubernetes. Bonus: agent orchestration frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI).

title: Senior Software Engineer
jd_text: Build LLM-powered agent systems. Python, FastAPI, vector databases (pgvector, Qdrant), Postgres, Redis. You will design tool-use loops and self-critique pipelines.

title: Backend Developer
jd_text: Backend developer needed. Java, Spring. (Reposted weekly for 6 months.)

title: Senior Backend Engineer
jd_text: Same role as Greenhouse listing — to exercise dedupe.

title: Engineering Manager, Backend
jd_text: EM role. Manage a team of 6 backend engineers. Strong Python background, distributed systems, mentoring, on-call leadership.
